justification: All 7 ACs implemented and tested. Collect-all-errors pattern confirmed (not fail-fast). AC5 conditional required for express with saturday_delivery undefined. AC6 conditional forbidden for standard with saturday_delivery provided (both true and false). AC7 tested with multi-failure inputs (2-failure and 3-failure). Error shape is { field, code }. No external libraries. acceptance_criteria_coverage maps all 7 ACs. 15 tests passing.

observations.text: AC5/AC6 distinction is correct and well-tested — saturday_delivery=false counts as provided for AC6 but not for AC5
AC7 tested with both 2-failure and 3-failure inputs, asserting exact error counts
Boundary cases covered (weight=1000 valid, whitespace-only recipient_name invalid)
AC6 tests both true and false values of saturday_delivery for standard shipment type
